title: Player Ladder
description: Allows you to sit on other players
body:
## **Overview** Player Ladder introduces the ability to ride or pick up other players by simply right-clicking on them. ### **Extra Features** - Extends the `/ride` command to support mounting entities on top of players. - Includes [Pick Up Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/pickup-me) functionality(`rightClickMode` needs to be switched to **PICK_UP** in the config). - If installed on client, allows interacting with the world while there's an entity on top.
- Allows picking up/riding any living entity(off by default) Only the latest version of **Minecraft** is supported. [FConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/fconfiglib) is required if you're on Fabric.
The config can be edited via GUI if **Cloth Config API** and **Mod Menu** are installed. ### **Similar mods/addons** * [Sit On Player](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/scripts/sit-on-player-unofficial-bedrock-port-of-player) by Zepaii for Minecraft Bedrock Edition
